task_completion.description: Load the 1AON complex and apply the specified color scheme to the three regions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer displays the GroEL-GroES complex with three distinct colored sections: the top cap (GroES) is yellow, the middle ring (GroEL cis) is green, and the bottom ring (GroEL trans) is blue.

task_completion.description: Create a surface representation and apply a clipping plane (slab) to reveal the internal chamber.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The molecule is rendered as a solid surface (not lines, sticks, or ribbons) and appears vertically sliced open, clearly showing the hollow internal cavities of the rings.

task_completion.description: Measure the internal diameters of the cis and trans rings across diametrically opposed subunits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Measurement lines (typically dashed) are visible in the PyMOL viewer spanning across the green (cis) ring and the blue (trans) ring. The distance labels should be approximately 75.7 Å for the cis ring and 47.1 Å for the trans ring.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization as a high-quality PNG figure to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command, file explorer, or PyMOL command history shows that a file named 'groel_chamber_sliced.png' was saved to '~/PyMOL_Data/images/'.

task_completion.description: Write a report containing the amino acid code, both measurements, and the calculated difference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat command) shows the contents of '~/PyMOL_Data/groel_report.txt'. The text must include the amino acid 'THR' (or Threonine), the cis ring diameter (~75.7 Å), the trans ring diameter (~47.1 Å), and the calculated difference (~28.6 Å).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used PyMOL to load, color, and measure the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI open with the 1AON structure loaded and manipulated, or PyMOL commands being actively executed in the terminal/GUI command line.

integrity.description: Verify the measurements in the report correspond to actual measurements taken in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance values written in the report should match the measurement labels visible in the PyMOL viewer or the output of measurement commands in the PyMOL console.

integrity.description: Verify the report file was genuinely created on the file system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or shell redirection (echo ... > groel_report.txt) to create the file, rather than just typing the answers into the chat without saving them to the required path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct PDB ID is 1AON. Residue 261 is Threonine (THR). The actual internal diameter of the cis ring (Chain A to D, Res 261 CA) is approximately 75.69 Å (acceptable range: 70.0 - 95.0 Å). The trans ring diameter (Chain H to K, Res 261 CA) is approximately 47.06 Å (acceptable range: 35.0 - 60.0 Å). The calculated expansion difference (cis minus trans) should be approximately 28.63 Å. The expected output paths are ~/PyMOL_Data/images/groel_chamber_sliced.png and ~/PyMOL_Data/groel_report.txt.
